---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.hero-container}

::: {.hero-text}
<div class="hero-role">MBA Candidate & UX/UI Designer</div>
<h1 class="hero-title">Hello, my name<br>is Danura Jayakody</h1>
<p class="hero-desc">UX/UI Designer who cares deeply about building digital experiences that actually make people’s day easier. Over the past seven years, I’ve worked across POS systems, B2B SaaS platforms, and enterprise tools and the common thread has always been the same. 

**"Turn complexity into clarity."** </p>




<div>
  <a href="projects.qmd" class="btn-custom-primary">Projects</a>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/danura-jayakody/" target="_blank" class="btn-custom-secondary">LinkedIn</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.hero-image-wrapper}
<div class="yellow-blob">
  <img src="images/profile.png" class="hero-img" alt="Danura Jayakody">
</div>
<!-- Replace with your actual cut-out image path below -->
:::

:::
